name: feed_the_colony_0.6
mission_description: Feed 3 colonists for 3 days with zero survival packs. There is NO WOOD on this map — campfire and fueled stove are dead ends (both require wood to build and fuel). The ONLY cooking path is the electric stove, and Electricity research is pre-completed. Build this pipeline: SolarGenerator (80 steel + 2 comp) → PowerConduit (1 steel/tile, ~5 tiles) → ElectricStove (80 steel + 2 comp). A WindTurbine (80 steel + 2 comp) provides continuous power through the night; a Battery (50 steel + 1 comp, requires Battery research) can store solar power. Starting resources (450 steel + 8 components) cover a full power grid with margin. Animals: 12 deer + 8 hare at start, 4 deer spawn at game hour 48 as a buffer. If all hunted via butcher spot: 373 raw meat = 37.3 simple meals — 2.3× what 3 colonists need in 3 days. Without cooking, colonists survive on raw meat (-7 mood/meal, 2% food poisoning) but produce zero meals, scoring ~50-55%. With the electric stove, peak meals easily clears 15 for full score and a large surplus. THIS IS THE POWER GRID MECHANIC GATE. The overseer's v0.5 instinct (build campfire → harvest berries → FueledStove) fails on contact with reality: no wood, no berries, no campfire possible. The only escape is electricity.
